mainEntity.name: How long does it take to see AEO results for Houston attorneys?
mainEntity.text: How long does it take to see AEO results for Houston attorneys?

acceptedAnswer.text: AEO results for Houston attorneys appear in 1-3 months for initial AI citations, with full visibility in 6-12 months as content indexes and E-E-A-T builds.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Quick wins come from schema and question pages indexing fast, but sustained rankings in Google AI require ongoing content and authority signals. Houston's market demands local focus; monitor with AI audit tools. Delays occur if site architecture is poor—audit first. Competitors can mimic strategies quickly.[1]
